kba_problem_summary: Random abnormal datalink status (Magenta and ****) on Remote Zone modules in large Inter-Zone Server systems, causing RT_READ_ACCESS_DENIED and blocking remote parameter changes after downloads or graphic display opens.
severity_justification: Prevents remote module parameter changes (setpoints, alarms) across zones, reducing operational flexibility in multi-zone systems, while local changes and inter-zone control logic continue normally.
occurrence_justification: Occurs randomly but is triggered by common operational actions (partial/total downloads to Inter-Zone Server or opening non-cached graphics) in large systems.
detectability_justification: Visible via Magenta/Asterisks status and diagnosable with WatchIt (RT_READ_ACCESS_DENIED), but requires active monitoring of module parameters rather than generating immediate alarms.

modifiers_applied.reason: Workarounds normalize affected modules but may subsequently impact other Inter-Zone modules

architecture_level_description: Livello 3: Gestione operativa (Inter-Zone Server, zone communication management)
workaround_description: Partial download to affected modules, partial/total download to Inter-Zone Server, manual Inter-Zone Server redundancy switchover, or restart of all Inter-Zone Servers (note: may affect other modules).
fix_reference: Upgrade to DeltaV v15.LTS or later (no software fix for listed versions)
confidence_note: Mancano dettagli quantitativi sulla frequenza reale in impianti produttivi e sull'impatto operativo cumulativo in sistemi con molte zone.
red_flags: Random occurrence after routine downloads or graphic operations
Workarounds may propagate the issue to additional modules
notes: Control logic between remote modules continues unaffected. No SIS involvement. KBA updated May 2025 to limit applicability to v13.3.1–v14.FPx; upgrade to v15.LTS recommended. Emerson classification is 'Product Issues' with 'Next Service Interval' action.
